metadata.description: Formal methods toolkit for multi-agent development using VDM-SL

plugins.name: formal-agent-contracts
plugins.description: Define agent contracts in VDM-SL, verify specifications, auto-prove with Z3, generate code scaffolds with runtime contract checks, run end-to-end integrated workflows, reverse-engineer specifications from existing code, import natural language specs to VDM-SL, and export human-readable specification documents. Includes evaluation framework with comparative benchmarks.
